title: rubus pubescens var. villicaulis
intro: Rubus pubescens var. villicaulis, also known as the hairy-stemmed black raspberry, is a variant of the black raspberry plant that is native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus pubescens var. villicaulis include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
